title: Wildflower
why_this_song: Wildflower by Billie Eilish (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well, good things don't last (good things don't last)
Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself
Do you see her in the back of your mind?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Things fall apart and time breaks your heart

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wasn't there, but I know
You don't need to remind me (remind me)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Billie Eilish one question about "Wildflower", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Billie Eilish sobre "Wildflower", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Wildflower" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Wildflower" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Wildflower" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Wildflower" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Wildflower" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Wildflower" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
